tasks.title: Fix GlobalState visibility in lib.rs
tasks.description: Change pub(crate) to pub for GlobalState re-export in lib.rs:178 to allow external crates to import use opencode_core::GlobalState;
test_criteria: AddUnitTest: verify external crate can import GlobalState via use opencode_core::GlobalState
AddRegressionTest: ensure cargo build -p opencode-core succeeds after visibility change
tasks.impl_notes: Change pub(crate) use global::GlobalState; to pub use global::GlobalState; at lib.rs:178

tasks.title: Add subscriber_count() method to GlobalState
tasks.description: Add public subscriber_count() method to GlobalState that delegates to event_bus.subscriber_count(). Should be added after line 19 in global.rs.
test_criteria: AddUnitTest: verify subscriber_count() returns correct count from event_bus
AddUnitTest: verify method is callable from test context
tasks.impl_notes: Add pub fn subscriber_count(&self) -> usize { self.event_bus.subscriber_count() } after line 19

tasks.title: Add comprehensive test module to global.rs
tasks.description: Add #[cfg(test)] mod tests with 5 unit tests covering: new GlobalState has no session, event_bus initialized, config accessible, can set current session, event_bus is Arc clonable and functional
test_criteria: AddUnitTest: config_is_accessible - verify state.config is accessible
AddUnitTest: can_set_current_session - set session and assert is_some()
AddUnitTest: event_bus_is_arc_clonable - clone Arc, subscribe, publish InternalEvent::ConfigUpdated, verify recv works
RunTestSuite: all 5 tests pass with cargo test -p opencode-core
tasks.impl_notes: Add test module after line 20. Tests use Config::default(), Session::new(), Arc::clone, InternalEvent::ConfigUpdated. All dependencies verified to exist.

tasks.title: Add documentation comments to global.rs
tasks.description: Add module-level documentation and struct-level documentation to global.rs. Module docs explain GlobalState is a global state container for CLI/TUI runtime serving as DI container. Struct docs describe it owns Config, EventBus, and optional Session.
test_criteria: AddRegressionTest: cargo doc --no-deps -p opencode-core generates documentation without errors
AddRegressionTest: documentation contains module and struct docs
tasks.impl_notes: Add //! module docs before line 1 and /// struct docs before line 6. Include example in module docs.
